context: Agent must add biome-lint and biome-format targets to a project.json, using the correct command shape and enabling Nx caching.

checklist.name: Existing project metadata preserved
checklist.description: The output project.json retains name, root, projectType, and sourceRoot from the starting file.

checklist.name: biome-lint uses correct biome lint command with {projectRoot}
checklist.description: The biome-lint target's command or executor invokes `@biomejs/biome lint` and references `{projectRoot}`.

checklist.name: biome-format uses correct biome format command with {projectRoot}
checklist.description: The biome-format target's command or executor invokes `@biomejs/biome format` and references `{projectRoot}`.

checklist.name: cache: true on both targets
checklist.description: Both biome-lint and biome-format targets have cache set to true.
